body.text: {"id":"900000000000000001","type":"answer","author":{"fullname":"示例作者甲"},"header":{"text":"如何设计一个可维护的移动命令行？","action_url":"https://www.zhihu.com/question/800000000000000001"},"question":{"id":"800000000000000001","title":"如何设计一个可维护的移动命令行？"},"voteup_count":128,"comment_count":12,"created_time":1767225600,"updated_time":1767312000,"structured_content":{"segments":[{"id":"0","type":"heading","heading":{"level":2,"text":"先稳定命令契约"}},{"id":"1","type":"paragraph","paragraph":{"text":"移动端与桌面端可以使用不同执行器，但应该返回相同的数据结构。"}},{"id":"2","type":"list_node","list_node":{"items":[{"text":"命令层只负责参数和输出"},{"text":"Provider 负责数据来源"}]}},{"id":"3","type":"image","image":{"urls":["https://picx.zhimg.com/example.jpg"]}}]}}
